name: cutscript
description: CutScript — Open-source AI-powered text-based video editor

scripts.predev: lsof -ti :5173 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti :8642 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && npm run dev:electron"
scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run uvicorn main:app --reload --port 8642
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && electron-builder
